title: Better Blue Netherite
description: Makes Ancient Debris fully bright blue so you can spot them instantly! Even in dark tunnels or under lava.
body: Better Blue Netherite makes **all** Ancient Debris **bright blue** so it’s **extremely** easy to see them in the Nether. No more missing debris hidden in Netherrack or basalt. just spot it **instantly** and mine it **fast**.
